title: MARCH 2025 FLOOD RECOVERY SUPPORT - 211info
text: GLIDE REVITALIZATION MARCH 2025 FLOOD RECOVERY SUPPORT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides long-term recovery assistance for Douglas County residents impacted by the March 2025 flooding. Assistance may include support with housing, home rehabilitation, debris clean up, emergency food, clothing and home furnishings, and mental health services. May be able to refer to home safety inspectors and well water testing assistance. 301 Glide Loop Drive Glide, OR 97443 Eligibility: Residents impacted by the March 2025 flooding Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-4pm Email (541) 671-0189 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 671-0189 Main phone Main phone (541) 671-0189 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or email for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Douglas County Services: Disaster Related Clothing/Emergency Supplies Furniture * Disaster/Emergency Issues Home Rehabilitation Programs * Disaster/Emergency Issues Post Disaster Cleanup Post Disaster Food Services Post Disaster Housing Assistance Post Disaster Mental Health Services Post Disaster Safety Inspection/Evaluation Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - CARMEN BERNAL COMPASSIONATE NURSING SCHOLARSHIP COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - GLIDE REVITALIZATION SKILLED TRADES SCHOLARSHIP DISASTER SERVICES - DONATIONS PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - UMPQUA FLASH ASSISTANCE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
